title: Reactivity Models (Signals vs. VDOM)
description: Evaluate different reactivity models, including Signals and Virtual DOM, for their performance characteristics. Analyze the implications of fine-grained reactivity versus top-down diffing for applications with high-frequency data updates.
objectives: Evaluate different reactivity models, including Signals and Virtual DOM, for their performance characteristics.
Analyze the implications of fine-grained reactivity versus top-down diffing for applications with high-frequency data updates.
